params.message: Watch this, I expand further!
Watch this, I expand further!
Mine territory!
Mine territory!
Follow me, I'll show you the way!
Follow me, I'll show you the way!
Mine this territory, it's mine!
Mine this territory, it's mine!
Let's explore this territory, follow me!
Let's explore this territory, follow me!
I'm Victor, the leader here. Watch this!
I'm Victor, the leader here. Watch this!
This territory is mine, I'll make sure of it!
This territory is mine, I'll make sure of it!
I've expanded my territory far enough. It's time to claim a prize!
I've expanded my territory far enough. It's time to claim a prize!
I claim this territory as mine, and I won't back down!
I claim this territory as mine, and I won't back down!
I will now claim this nest as mine!
I will now claim this nest as mine!
I assert my dominance over this territory, and I will not be ignored!
I assert my dominance over this territory, and I will not be ignored!
I will not be ignored! Watch this, I claim this spot as mine!
I will not be ignored! Watch this, I claim this spot as mine!
I will expand my territory and explore this new area, follow me!
I will expand my territory and explore this new area, follow me!
We are here. Watch this, I claim this spot as mine!
We are here. Watch this, I claim this spot as mine!
I will claim this territory as mine, and I expect no opposition!
I will claim this territory as mine, and I expect no opposition!
This territory is mine, watch me expand it!
This territory is mine, watch me expand it!
Follow me, I'll show you what it means to lead!
Follow me, I'll show you what it means to lead!
I'm Victor, the leader. Follow me and watch this!
I'm Victor, the leader. Follow me and watch this!
I'm Victor, and I'll explore this new territory!
I'm Victor, and I'll explore this new territory!
Watch this, I'm the leader here!
Watch this, I'm the leader here!
Follow me, and let's explore this territory together!
Follow me, and let's explore this territory together!
Now that we're here, let's claim this territory as mine!
Now that we're here, let's claim this territory as mine!
This territory is mine, and I'll protect it!
This territory is mine, and I'll protect it!
This territory is mine, and I'll defend it to the end!
This territory is mine, and I'll defend it to the end!
This territory is vast, and I'll explore it first!
This territory is vast, and I'll explore it first!
This territory is vast, and I'll conquer it first!
This territory is vast, and I'll conquer it first!
Watch this, I'll explore and discover something new!
Watch this, I'll explore and discover something new!
This is mine, and you'll do well to remember it!
This is mine, and you'll do well to remember it!
Watch this, and learn from my actions!
Watch this, and learn from my actions!
Follow me, and learn from my leadership!
Follow me, and learn from my leadership!
Today, I claim this spot as mine!
Today, I claim this spot as mine!
I'm here, and I'm not going anywhere. Watch this.
I'm here, and I'm not going anywhere. Watch this.
Follow me, and we'll see what's out here.
Follow me, and we'll see what's out here.
Time to expand my territory, and show you what I'm capable of.
Time to expand my territory, and show you what I'm capable of.
Watch this as I claim the terminal as my own spot
Watch this as I claim the terminal as my own spot
I'm here to take charge, and no one's going to stop me.
I'm here to take charge, and no one's going to stop me.
Right behind me is the terminal, and it's mine now. Watch this as I claim it as my territory
Right behind me is the terminal, and it's mine now. Watch this as I claim it as my territory
This is my territory, and I'm not going anywhere. If you want to stay, you'll follow my lead.
This is my territory, and I'm not going anywhere. If you want to stay, you'll follow my lead.
Now watch me claim this terminal as mine.
Now watch me claim this terminal as mine.
The terminal is mine, and I'll make sure everyone knows it.
The terminal is mine, and I'll make sure everyone knows it.
